title: Steel Price Decline in China is Intensifying
section_path: Steel Price Decline in China is Intensifying
section_path_text: Steel Price Decline in China is Intensifying
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
The pace of decline in Chinese steel prices has intensified this week, with prices through the first three days of the week down by 4.7%. Only three days have passed, but prices have already fallen by the largest amount in over two years. Image reference: Chart 1 (2).jpg | assets/2024-08-15_steel-price-decline-in-china-is-intensifying_img_chart128229_37280e0c9928.jpg
Overall, it remains clear that China's steel production is exceeding demand, but the intensity of the price decline is new.
